title: Cobblemeown
description: Cobblemon pack with extra pokemon content, optimization, and quality-of-life mods
body:
Expanding upon [the Official Cobblemon modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-fabric) by adding "missing" Pokemon content, including [Pokemon Riding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonrider1.5/) and [Mega Evolution](https://modrinth.com/mod/ascension-megamons). Layering that with additional optimization and quality-of-life mods.

This pack was put together for my group of friends in mind.

Message me on Discord if you have any questions/issues: minism
